comment: This app used to work great. Now, whenever I use the tap to translate floating feature it creates a new circle every time I translate something so that I have multiple copies of the icon on my phone screen. I have tried uninstalling and reinstalling twice.
the function of activity: The activity facilitates translation and navigation:Search, menu, navigate, history, handwriting, options, text entry, paste, language swap, and settings management for user interaction and feedback.
